---
title: "Continued Assessment 2"
format: html
editor: visual
author: "Undjee Kangueehi & Ben Frost"
---

```{r echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(dplyr)
library(corrplot)
library(tidyr)
```

Database Import & SVD Function Call:

```{r}
db <- read.csv("CA2.csv") |> as.matrix()
sVD <- svd(db)
```

Latex Vector Output Function Declaration:

```{r}
latexVec <- function(x, digits = NULL) {
  if (!is.null(digits)) x <- round(x, digits)
  paste0("\\begin{bmatrix}", paste(x, collapse = " \\\\ "), "\\end{bmatrix}")
}
```

Approximation Function Declaration:

```{r}
svdApproximation <- function(rank) {
  approx <- sVD$u[,1:rank] %*% diag(sVD$d)[1:rank, 1:rank, drop = FALSE] %*% t(sVD$v[,1:rank])
  return(approx)
}
```

Error Calculation for Each k = r:

```{r}
xHatVector <- vector("list", 12)
deltaVector <- vector("list", 12)

for (k in 1:12) {
  xHatVector[[k]] <- svdApproximation(k)
  deltaVector[[k]] <- db - xHatVector[[k]]
}
```

## Question 1:

For **k = 4** the Mean Approximation Error Vector is as follows;

```{r results = 'asis', echo = FALSE}
delta4 <- deltaVector[[4]]
delta4MeanVector <- colMeans(delta4)

cat("\\\n")
cat("Mean Approximation Error Vector = ", latexVec(delta4MeanVector, digits = 3), "\n")
cat("\\\n")
```
